title: Onboarding - Animations
scenario: Onboarding animations in Poly Lens Menu > User Guides fail to play correctly when tapping, swiping, or navigating through screens
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app → Home screen
Tap Poly Lens Menu (hamburger icon or menu icon)
Select an onboarding guide (e.g., first-time setup or feature tutorial)
Observe the animation on the first screen
Tap Next to advance to the next screen
Observe the animation on the subsequent screen(s)
Tap X (close) to exit the onboarding flow
Re-enter the same onboarding guide via Poly Lens Menu > User Guides
Observe the animation on the first screen again
Tap Next repeatedly until reaching the final screen
Tap Done or User Guide to exit
Re-enter the onboarding guide again and observe animations
expected: All onboarding animations play smoothly without stuttering, freezing, or visual glitches. Tapping on the animation does not break playback. Swiping left/right transitions correctly between screens with proper animation. Tapping Next advances to the next screen with correct animation. Tapping X exits the onboarding flow cleanly. On subsequent visits, animations replay correctly from the beginning without skipping or errors. Tapping Done/User Guide exits properly.
